name: nuko-nova-tools
description: Claude Code plugins built at Nuko Nova Dynamics.

plugins.name: claude-goal
plugins.description: Codex-style autonomous goal loop. Use /goal-start "objective" or explicit prose like "set up a goal" and the agent self-drives turns under large smart budget profiles, with practical-unlimited defaults, pause/resume, /goal-extend, /compact recovery, per-subagent token attribution, and persistence across claude restart. Complements Claude Code 2.1.139+'s built-in /goal.
